nasb.text: Yet it does not so intend, Nor does it plan so in its heart, But rather it is its purpose to destroy And to cut off many nations.

esv.text: But he does not so intend, and his heart does not so think; but it is in his heart to destroy, and to cut off nations not a few;

cnv.text: 但亞述並沒有這樣想過， 他心裡也沒有這樣打算； 他心裡倒想毀滅、 剪除多國。

ccb.text: 可是他却不这样想， 心里也不这样盘算， 他只想毁灭许多国家。

csbs.text: 但这不是他所想的， 也不是他的心思打算； 他心里所怀的却是毁灭、剪除多国。
